response:
Progress Report, Part II  
This report highlights the visual enhancements implemented during the game's reconstruction. Although we successfully nearly doubled the frame rate by incorporating optimization features into the framework, the integration of new hardware-intensive functionalities, such as dynamic fluid particles and physics-based hair strands, introduces performance considerations. We aim to maintain a balance between these features.  

Picture #1 illustrates the new belly bulge system. In the updated game, each character has a specific stomach capacity that determines how much "body fluid" they can absorb through their womb, stomach, and bowels. For instance, Dr. Anya can take in 4000ml of sperm without overflowing, whereas Alet can only accommodate 2800ml. Male test subjects release a varying amount of fluid during climax: a Dreamer typically expels around 10-15ml, while an Elder Thing may inject 400-600ml into their partner.  

Picture #2 and #3 showcase the new cum and love juice visual effects. The fluid effects are not pre-defined in sexual scenes and instead activate dynamically based on the character's sensitivity, ecstasy level, and stamina. Certain character perks, resulting from experimenting with specific test subjects, may increase the likelihood of urinary incontinence or significant squirting.  

Picture #4 and #5 depict dynamic body interactions and skin decals in VR. The hands are controlled using a VR controller.  

Pictures #6, #7, and #8 present previews of upcoming bondage devices and cooperative sexual scenarios. More details will be released next month.  

The May Monthly Poll and returning costume bundle will be available in a few hours.
